shellCommands.command: pwd && rg -n "updateFieldArrayRootError|fieldArray.*Error|root.*error|isFieldArray|errors" src/logic src/useFieldArray.ts src | head -240
find src -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | head -200 && grep -RInE "updateFieldArrayRootError|fieldArray.*Error|isFieldArray|root.*error" src | head -240

sed -n '1,120p' src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts; sed -n '500,720p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '820,910p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '340,420p' src/useFieldArray.ts; sed -n '1000,1085p' src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx; grep -RIn "updateFieldArrayRootError" src/__tests__ src | head -80

sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/convertToArrayPayload.ts; sed -n '1060,1125p' src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx; sed -n '1,80p' src/utils/set.ts; sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/get.ts; git status --short; cat package.json

sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/isObject.ts; sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/isPlainObject.ts; grep -RIn "root" src/types/errors.ts src/types | head -80; grep -RIn "should preserve resolver nested\|field-array" src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx | tail -60; sed -n '1125,1195p' src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx

grep -RIn "Object.keys.*numeric\|isNaN(.*+\|parseInt\|/^\\d\|convertToArrayPayload" src | head -160; grep -RIn "updateFieldArrayRootError" . --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git; git log --oneline --all -- src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts | head -20; git branch -a --no-color | head -30

git show 6b2093df:src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts 2>/dev/null || true; git show 6067c3f8:src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts 2>/dev/null || true; sed -n '1,80p' src/__tests__/utils/convertToArrayPayload.test.ts; sed -n '1,100p' src/types/errors.ts; sed -n '1,100p' src/constants.ts

sed -n '350,410p' src/useFieldArray.ts; sed -n '1180,1265p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1265,1360p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; grep -n "const trigger\|trigger:" src/logic/createFormControl.ts
sed -n '1110,1185p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1,80p' src/useFieldArray.ts; grep -n "function remove\|const remove\|remove =" src/useFieldArray.ts; sed -n '245,350p' src/useFieldArray.ts
sed -n '180,245p' src/useFieldArray.ts; grep -n "_setFieldArray" src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '930,1035p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts
sed -n '240,315p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/remove.ts; grep -n "_setFieldArray" -B5 -A15 src/types/form.ts

sed -n '1,120p' src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx; grep -n "resolver" src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx | head -20; grep -n "remove" src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx | head -30; sed -n '1,80p' src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx
node_modules/.bin/jest --config ./scripts/jest/jest.config.js src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx --runInBand
wc -l src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx; git show HEAD:src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx | wc -l; git status --short
git show HEAD:src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx > src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx && wc -l src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx && git status --short
node_modules/.bin/jest --config ./scripts/jest/jest.config.js src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx --runInBand
git diff -- src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts; node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit
git log -1 --oneline; git remote -v; git status --short; npm run build
sed -n '1,100p' src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts; npm run build

sed -n '1,100p' src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts; node_modules/.bin/jest --config ./scripts/jest/jest.config.js src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx --runInBand

node_modules/.bin/jest --config ./scripts/jest/jest.config.js src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx --runInBand && git diff --check && git status --short && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts
git diff --check && git status --short && git diff --stat && tail -c 1 src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts | od -An -t x1
npm run build
